g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does index.js do in Abserny and why is TTS prewarmed there?')
sendPrompt('How does App.js decide which screen to show in Abserny?')
sendPrompt('Walk me through the Abserny onboarding tutorial flow')
sendPrompt('How does the LanguagePicker work in Abserny?')
sendPrompt('What does MainApp render and how does its state machine work?')
sendPrompt('How does the useVoice hook work? Explain the queue and generation counter.')
sendPrompt('Explain all the gestures useGestures handles in Abserny')
sendPrompt('What are the four modes in Abserny and how does useModes manage them?')
sendPrompt('How does useLanguage handle bilingual support in Abserny?')
sendPrompt('How does useNetwork detect connectivity changes in Abserny?')
sendPrompt('How does useWatchMode work? Explain the frame loop, hazard detection, and cooldown.')
sendPrompt('How does useDetection choose between Gemini and ML Kit in Abserny?')
g.text: Key rotation → Gemini online / ML Kit offline fallback

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does Abserny use Gemini 2.0 Flash Lite? What prompts are used per mode?')
sendPrompt('How does Abserny use ML Kit for offline detection?')
sendPrompt('What does Abserny store in AsyncStorage?')
sendPrompt('Explain the SettingsOverlay component in Abserny')
sendPrompt('Explain AbsernyIcons.js — what icons does it contain?')
sendPrompt('What animations does Abserny use in the main camera screen?')
